    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen

    Klassen
    Klasse
    Beschreibung
    AppMain
    Serves as the main entry point for the project management tool.
    DataStorage
    Provides utility methods to handle data persistence using Properties.
    MainView
    Provides the main graphical user interface for the project management tool.
    ProjectModel
    Manages the list of tasks for the project management tool.
    Task
    Represents a single task in the project management tool.
    TaskController
    Controls the application startup and user interactions.
